---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or change to the mod
title: "[FEATURE] (Short Descriptive Title)"
labels: enhancement
assignees: Entropy159

---

- [ ] I have ensured this is not a duplicate

**Description**
Describe the change that you would like to see in the mod. Use as much detail as possible, this will help if it is implemented.

**Reason**
What caused this feature to be requested? This is not necessary, but it may help with considering whether to implement it.
